productName: Mindmelt Live Resin Vape Cart - GG4 - 1g - (H) - DOH
description: A hybrid vape cartridge filled with GG4 oil — smooth, flavorful vapor in a discreet, no-torch, push-button format that goes wherever you go. Smooth, discreet, and flavorful — with notes of pungent, earthy, and pine, with a balanced head-and-body experience.
